title: Misato on pickup duty
wikitext:
[]: Misato on pickup duty?             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 26, 2010 12:39 am It occurred to me out of the blue that it actually makes no sense whatsoever for Misato to be the one picking Shinji up. Yes she says she volunteered earlier, but when an angel decides to attack is the chief tactical officer really someone who can afford to be out of contact and roaming around a battlefield rather than just delegating it to some of the security or section 2 guys? Considering she didn't even seem to be aware that he was a pilot candidate at that point, how can this monumental lapse in priorities possibly be justified?

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Sun Sep 26, 2010 1:23 am She was probably already on her way to get him when the Angel attacked. After all, she is on her way when the U.N. is attempting to take care of business and NERV is not authorized to do anything yet. She was also suited up for a regular introduction and not in her work outfit. Misato also says something along the lines of "Why did it have to come at a time like this?"

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Sep 26, 2010 1:50 am She already promised to pick her up, the angel was just a coincidence. And without Shinji, they can´t do jack anyway. She kept her promise, the angel just came at random and she didn´t have any experience with previous angels.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Sep 26, 2010 8:54 am The whole affair was evidently orchastrated by Gendo. Obviously, he knew that Shinji's possible aversions to the thought of piloting Eva-01 would crumble under the weight of seeing Misato's boobs in the flesh. He later reinfroced this with having Rei get trollied to the Eva cage, with all the bandages and boobs. ....Actually no, it's what IntrumentalityOne said.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Sep 26, 2010 10:03 am Gendo must have known that Shinji would have little interest in working for him. So he probably ordered Misato do do whatever it took to get him there. Thus she came up with the "boobs-photo" plan to lure him. (It didn't hurt that this also fit her personality.) So she almost had to be the one to show up for him. If he came expecting to meet the breast lady and got an M.I.B. instead, he might have tried to take the next train back to sensei. I suppose the M.I.B. could have forced him to come along at gunpoint, but just sending Misato was the better plan.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Sep 26, 2010 10:10 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: She already promised to pick her up

Thus she came up with the "boobs-photo" plan to lure him. (It didn't hurt that this also fit her personality.) So she almost had to be the one to show up for him.
